Home / Service Areas / Concord

Tree-service in Concord, NC

Trusted local professionals serving Concord and surrounding communities

Serving Concord, NC

Concord, NC, is home to many 1980s-90s family homes with well-established trees that need professional care. Onyx Tree Service specializes in tree trimming, removal, and stump grinding to maintain the safety and aesthetics of your yard. The hot, humid summers here can stress trees, making proper maintenance essential. We also assist with storm damage cleanup, ensuring your property recovers quickly after severe weather.

Concord’s neighborhoods are characterized by 1980s-90s family homes with older, large trees.

Tree-service Services in Concord

Safe Tree Removal

Precision removal for hazardous or unwanted trees without damaging your property.

Learn more →

Complete Stump Removal

Thorough stump elimination that prevents regrowth and landscaping issues.

Learn more →

Expert Tree Pruning

Health-focused pruning that enhances tree structure and beauty.

Learn more →

24/7 Storm Response

Rapid response to storm-damaged trees threatening homes or power lines.

Learn more →

Strategic Tree Planting

Right tree, right place - expert species selection and planting.

Learn more →

Need Tree-service in Concord?

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout Concord and the surrounding area.
